rules.rule: Processing services must combine two or more foundation service primitives to form a business workflow.
Processing services must expose higher-order business verbs (Ensure, Process, Upsert, Calculate), not raw CRUD verbs.
Processing services must depend only on foundation services or other processing services; never on brokers directly.
Cross-cutting workflow concerns must be handled inside the processing service.
Every behavior must have a failing test written before the implementation (TDD).
All test inputs and outputs must be randomized; expected variables must use DeepClone().
